templates.title: Newborn MTM for Male Perm Staff
templates.intro: Our heartiest congratulations on the arrival of your little bundle of joy! This is truly a special time, and we hope you've been able to enjoy these precious moments with your new family. Here's some ways we wish to support you and your family on this journey.

sections.heading: More time with the little one
sections.body: Cherish the moments with the new addition to your family with your Paternity, Shared Parental and Enhanced Childcare leave.

sections.heading: Medical Protection for your newborn
sections.body: The bank provides core medical plan for all eligible dependants of permanent employees.

links.label: Update your dependant's details in People Hub, including their NRIC/FIN number
More info on medical benefits here

sections.heading: Pregnancy/new-born related claims
sections.body: Maternity Care: You will receive S$5,000 per newborn as reimbursement to help you defray the related medical expenses of giving birth to a newborn in Singapore or overseas, covering:
coverage: Paediatric care for the newborn within the first 14 days
sections.note: If both parents are employees of DBS, only one claim is allowed per newborn.

sections.heading: Discover other benefits
sections.body: Find out the full suite of benefits, including Flexible Work Arrangements, Staff Deals and more:

sections.heading: Be cared for and supported
sections.body: Navigating life's milestones can bring about exciting change and sometimes daunting transitions – iOK offers space to talk things through, whatever you may be experiencing. Access iOK here.

templates.title: Newborn MTM for Male Direct Contract
templates.intro: Our heartiest congratulations on the arrival of your little bundle of joy! This is truly a special time, and we hope you've been able to enjoy these precious moments with your new family. As you return to work, here's some ways we wish to support you and your family on this journey.

sections.heading: More time with the little one
sections.body: Cherish the moments with the new addition to your family with your Paternity, Shared Parental and Enhanced Childcare leave.
sections.note: You are required to have a minimum 90 calendar days of continuous service before the birth of your child to be eligible for paid Paternity and Shared Parental Leave.

sections.heading: Pregnancy/new-born related claims
sections.body: Maternity Care: You will receive S$5,000 per newborn as reimbursement to help you defray the related medical expenses of giving birth to a newborn in Singapore or overseas, covering:
coverage: Paediatric care for the newborn within the first 14 days
sections.note: If both parents are employees of DBS, only one claim is allowed per newborn.

sections.heading: Discover other benefits
sections.body: Find out the full suite of benefits, including Flexible Work Arrangements, Staff Deals and more:

sections.heading: Be cared for and supported
sections.body: Navigating life's milestones can bring about exciting change and sometimes daunting transitions – iOK offers space to talk things through, whatever you may be experiencing. Access iOK here.

templates.title: Newborn MTM for Female Perm Staff
templates.intro: Our heartiest congratulations on the arrival of your little bundle of joy! This is truly a special time, and we hope you've been able to enjoy several precious moments with your new family. As you return to work, here's some ways we wish to support you and your family on this journey.

sections.heading: More time with the little one
sections.body: Cherish the moments with the new addition to your family with your Maternity Leave, Shared Parental and Enhanced Childcare leave.

sections.heading: Medical Protection for your newborn
sections.body: The bank provides core medical plan for all eligible dependants of permanent employees. You may opt to enrol them on a higher plan during the annual enrolment period or when there is a life event change, subject to underwriting and approval by the insurer. Make sure they're covered, and enrol them under our medical plans today:

links.label: Update your dependant's details in People Hub, including their NRIC/FIN number
More info on medical benefits here

sections.heading: Pregnancy/new-born related claims
sections.body: Maternity Care: You will receive S$5,000 per newborn as reimbursement to help you defray the related medical expenses of giving birth to a newborn in Singapore or overseas, covering:
coverage: Paediatric care for the newborn within the first 14 days
sections.note: If both parents are employees of DBS, only one claim is allowed per newborn.

sections.heading: Returning to office – get access to nursing rooms
sections.body: Nursing rooms are spaces to provide a supportive environment for nursing mothers. Find out more and apply for access below.

sections.heading: Discover other benefits
sections.body: Find out the full suite of benefits, including Flexible Work Arrangements, Staff Deals and more:

sections.heading: Be cared for and supported
sections.body: Navigating life's milestones can bring about exciting change and sometimes daunting transitions – iOK offers space to talk things through, whatever you may be experiencing. Access iOK here.
